title: IngestibleSSH
description: Schema for IngestibleSSH in Nuix REST API

username.description: The username needed to access the server account.

password.description: The password needed to access the server account.

computer.description: The hostname or IP address of the target server.

sudoPassword.description: The password needed to access protected files when using SSH key based authentication.

keyFolder.description: Points to a folder on the local system which holds the SSH authentication key pairs.

portNumber.description: The port number to connect on.

hostFingerprint.description: The expected host fingerprint for the host being connected to. If this value is not set then any host fingerpint will be allowed, leaving the possibility of a man in the middle attack on the connection.

remoteFolder.description: This optional parameter limits the evidence to items underneath this starting folder.

accessingRemoteDisks.description: When set to true remote disks (e.g. '/dev/sda1') will be exposed as evidence instead of the remote system's file system structure.

initialLocation.description: Sets the location to use local disks with initial location.
